'''Mal Coramma''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] who worked for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

==Biography==
Mal Coramma's early life was a mystery, but his service with the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] chapter of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate was well-documented. Responsible for keeping the local criminals, such as [[Quetemoor the Sub-Elder|Quetemoor]] and [[Beuga Odell]], from stepping on Black Sun's toes, he had been a major player in the Coruscanti underworld. Following the death of Black Sun [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]] [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], Coramma allied himself with Xizor's niece, [[Savan]]. When she failed to resurrect Black Sun, the Chagrian envoy went to ground, keeping his distance from resurgent criminal organizations such as Quetemoor's. [[7 ABY/Legends|Three years later]], after the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] capture of Coruscant, Coramma sought out some of his old contacts and began working to restore the Black Sun organization to its former power and prestige on the capital world.<ref name="CatCW" />

==Personality and traits==
A fastidious perfectionist, Coramma had a Coruscanti accent and meticulously polished horns which befitted his role as a highly-skilled professional.<ref name="CatCW" />
